titleStmt.title: SII 39.113: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 113. (A.R. No. 113 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. SIVADHARMAPURIŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE WEST WALL OF THE SAME CELLAR MĀṞAVARMAN ALIAS TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN KULAŚĒKHARADĒVA-20TH YEAR.

summary.p: This inscription refers to the gift of money for burning six lamps before the deity in the temple of Tirukkōḷakkuḍi uḍaiyār., The above gift was made by a Nambiyārūraṉ alias Tarpurushadēvar a resident of Veliyāṟṟur in Keralasiṅga vaḷanāḍu by Muppattiraṇḍuvaṭṭattu Sivabrāhmanar, the priests of the same temple. Signatories like Mānicka-vāsaga-baṭṭaṉ, Brāhmadhirāya baṭṭaṉ, Tillaimūvāyira bhaṭṭan etc., are figured in the inscription.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī komāṟa paṉmarāṉa tiripuvac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī kulacekaradevaṟku
yāṇṭu 2 10vatu puṟamalaināṭṭut tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiyār śivadharmmiśvara
muṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilil muppattiraraṇṭu vaṭṭattuc civappirāmaṇarom
keraḷa ciṅka vaḷanāṭṭu veḷiyāṟṟūr nampiyāruraṉ ṉiṟaṇintāṉāṉa taṟpuruṣa
tevaṟku kalveṭṭik kuṭutta paricāvatu Ivaṟkāka ṉāṅkaḷ Uṭaiyār tirumuṉ
pu ciṟukālaic cantiyilirun tiruviḷakka cum tampirāṭṭiyār koyilil viṉāyakappi
ḷḷaiyāṟku Irākkāppirun tiruviḷakkoṉṟum Āka nāḷoṉṟukku Iruntiru
viḷakkāṉukkum Upaiyamāka nāṅkaḷivarpakkal paṟṟiṉa paḻamutalacciraṇṭu
Ivvac ciraṇṭukkum Ivviḷakkāṟum cantiyātipamāka muṭṭāmal cantirātit
tavaṟ cellumaḷavu miṭuvomākac cammatittuk kalveṭṭik kuṭuttom mup
pattiraṇṭu vaṭṭattuc civapirāmaṇarom taṟpuruṣa tevaṟku
Ippaṭikku Ivai māṇikkavācakap paṭṭaṉeḻuttu Ivai cuntarapāṇ
ṭiya brahmātarāyaṉ ṉeḻuttu Ivai candrabhūṣaṇa paṭṭaṉeḻuttu
Ivai tillai mūvāyirapaṭṭaṉ ṉeḻuttu Ikkalveṭṭukkup paṭi Olai E
ḻutiṉeṉivai koyil kaṇakku coḻaṉ Āṇṭa piḷḷaiyāṉa tiru
tāṇṭanta Eḻuttu śrī māheśvararakṣai
Digital edition of SII 39.113 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
